sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91252" key="ptu/cagris" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτύξαγρις</orth> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πύξαγρις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, name of the crab <sense id="n91252.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">which extracts</tr_> the flesh of the oyster from its shell by putting a small stone between the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">valves</tr_> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πτύχες</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυξία</foreign>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
